evidence: "Kid’s Holiday Favorite - fun for the whole family"
"Good story line. Somewhat predictable, but nice family film."
"Good series. Had its bumps in previous seasons."
"If the writers had give up some of their cherished and predictable tropes..."
"Well wrought production values. Wish there were more episodes."
"Hope they are able to keep the script from spinning out of control."
"If season 3 is given the green-light I will continue to watch."
"This classic rendition of Dennison's home in Africa is beautiful and full of longing."
"It manages to pull together themes of good and evil in a smart, thoughtful fashion."
"An uplifting tale of persevering against incredible odds - and prevailing."
"It is aging well. A finely wrought story."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly films with simple narratives and strong emotional resonance. They appreciate high production quality and thematic depth, while showing some sensitivity to pacing and narrative complexity. Overall, they favor uplifting stories that evoke strong feelings.
